string.name: widget_small
string.comment: Label of the small ankidroid widget. This text can\'t be found directly in AnkiDroid

string.name: deck_picker_widget_description
string.comment: Title of the Deck Picker Widget. Displayed to the user in Android\'s Widget Selection menu

string.name: no_selected_deck_placeholder_title
string.comment: Placeholder title when no decks are selected

resources.string: Selecteer sets om weer te geven in de widget. Selecteer sets met het + icoon.

string.name: deck_removed_from_widget
string.comment: Snackbar when deck is removed from widget

string.name: deck_already_selected_message
string.comment: Snackbar when user try to select the same deck again

plurals.name: deck_limit_reached

item.comment: Consider keeping the unbreakable space after the digit

plurals.item: Je kan tot wel %d sets selecteren.

item.comment: Consider keeping the unbreakable space after the digit

string.name: empty_widget_state
string.comment: To denote the widget is empty

resources.string: Ontbrekende sets. Klik om opnieuw te configureren.

string.name: empty_collection_state_in_widget
string.comment: To denote the collection is empty

resources.string: Collectie is leeg, gebruik de app om sets toe te voegen en opnieuw te configureren.
